Điều này đảm bảo du khách có thể tận hưởng những giây phút thư giãn và thỏa mãn mọi nhu cầu của họ.

Với điểm số 9.6 cho vị trí, Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach được đánh giá cao về vị trí thuận lợi. Nằm cách bãi biển Waikiki chỉ vài bước chân, khách sạn này mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời với khung cảnh biển xanh rực rỡ và cát trắng mịn màng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng gần các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng của Honolulu, giúp du khách dễ dàng khám phá và khám phá văn hóa địa phương.

sample_comments.text:
Vừa bước vào phòng, tôi đã cảm thấy như mình đang ở một thế giới khác. Nếu đã ở lại thì tôi rất khuyên bạn nên ở phòng có tầm nhìn ra biển. Cảnh vật đẹp như thiên đường, ghế sofa và giường đều êm ái và dễ chịu, tôi đã muốn ở lại trong không gian này mãi mãi. Gần đó có nhiều quán ăn ngon và các trung tâm mua sắm cũng gần, rất tiện lợi để mua quà. Tôi cũng đã sử dụng nhà hàng (The beach house) và tất cả các món ăn đều tuyệt vời và ngon miệng, vì vậy tôi rất khuyên bạn nên thử. Nếu bạn ở khách sạn này, tốt nhất là không nên lên lịch gì cả mà thả lỏng ở khách sạn, tham gia các hoạt động hoặc thư giãn bên biển hoặc hồ bơi. Dĩ nhiên, bữa ăn thì tôi sẽ mua mang về và ăn ở lanai trong khi ngắm biển.

Dịch vụ cũng không có vấn đề gì. Nhân viên người Nhật nói tiếng Nhật nên nếu bạn là người Nhật, bạn sẽ không cảm thấy lo lắng chút nào. Tôi đã có một chuyến đi với em bé 0 tuổi, nhưng nhờ có khách sạn này mà tôi đã có thể tận hưởng trọn vẹn hương vị đặc trưng của Hawaii.

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text: Con gái tôi và tôi đã có một chuyến du lịch hai người. Khi làm thủ tục nhận phòng, được đeo vòng hoa khiến tâm trạng tôi phấn khởi cực kỳ! Từ phòng ở tầng 11, cảnh biển thật tuyệt vời đến mức bây giờ nghĩ lại vẫn phải mỉm cười. Diamond Head cũng nhìn thấy rất đẹp. Thời gian ngồi trên lanai, thư giãn ngắm cảnh thật là hạnh phúc. Gần chợ quốc tế và Trung tâm Royal Hawaiian, địa điểm rất thuận tiện. Cà phê Honolulu ở tầng một của khách sạn cũng rất ngon. Chuyến đi Hawaii này thật sự thú vị. Một điều hơi tiếc là áp lực nước trong vòi hoa sen hơi thấp. Những điều khác đều rất hài lòng tổng thể chắc chắn lần sau chúng tôi sẽ quay lại.
sample_comments.title: Tầm nhìn ra đại dương thật tuyệt vời!
sample_comments.room_type: Tower Ocean View, Larger Guest room, 2 Queen, Ocean view, Renovated, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Lovely building and location, meh room.
sample_comments.positives: The building is gorgeous inside and out. The view and access to the beach is fantastic. The location is convenient to much of Waikiki, with easy access to other parts of Honolulu. The bed was amazingly comfortable.
sample_comments.negatives: The room itself was lackluster for the price. The decor was odd in a way that's hard to describe. The balcony was inaccessible, which was explained at check in, but the doors to it couldn't even be opened for a nice sea breeze. Similarly the window only opened about 2 inches. It seems that either it should open all the way or not at all.

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: The location is the best IMO. The hotel has great ambience as an older hotel from the 1950s or so.
sample_comments.negatives: The Banyon city view rooms were not up to expectations. Too small for the cost and the walls let too much noise from the adjoining rooms through. We upgraded to ocean view rooms that were somewhat larger and we could see the beach from the balcony.

sample_comments.text: Từ bãi đỗ xe trước chính diện, khi bước vào bên trong, quang cảnh quán cà phê ở phía trước và bãi biển ở xa ngay lập tức hiện ra trước mắt. Bên tay phải là nhân viên phục vụ và khu vực giữ hành lý, tiếp theo là quầy lễ tân của khách sạn. Bên trong được quản lý rất sạch sẽ, không cho thấy dấu hiệu của thời gian trôi qua, mà ngược lại, lại mang đến cảm giác dễ chịu của không khí theo mùa. Trong phòng, công tác bảo trì được thực hiện chu đáo, mang lại sự thoải mái, chỉ tiếc là không thể ra ngoài ban công vì lý do an toàn. Tiệc buffet sáng thật thoải mái và dễ chịu khi được thưởng thức tại các bàn ngoài trời.
sample_comments.title: Không khí của một nơi lâu đời và việc quản lý trong tòa nhà rất chu đáo.

sample_comments.title: Beauty only skin deep, DISGRACEFUL & $$$$
sample_comments.text:
The room was in the Diamond tower. Very tired looking room with paper thin walls therefore could hear the neighbours talking and TV on both sides of the room very clearly when I first arrived and was told my idea of noise was not the same as others.....really??? I thought it would be inherent to expect some level of quiet in the room???? Room had twin beds with a bathroom that was really small about 2.5 square meters therefore no room for toiletries. 

After much discussion and some time with reception about the noise level, assigned another room in the same tower which had no neighbors only for 1 night. This room was unclean as I found a empty water bottle at the back of the desk when I was trying to locate power plug and insufficient power sockets as they had to use a multiadaptor which did not look very safe. This room had peeling wallpaper and on the final day of my stay there was a foul odour coming from the drain. This was the icing on the cake. Needed bathroom and had to go into the lobby. Spoke again to reception as I was leaving very early next morning for return flight home and needed one good nights sleep. Finally was upgraded to a room in the Tower which was the newer section of the hotel with both sound proofing and larger rooms! 

I spoke to others staying in the Diamond Tower and they had the same experiences with the noise coming from neighbors because the rooms are not sound proofed! It is a DISGRACE to call the old sections of the hotel '4 star' and charge the rates they do!

I will never stay there again and I will inform everyone I know about my experience at the surfrider and encourage them to stay somewhere else if they have Moana surfrider in mind. HORRIBLE the pool was tiny dirty but overcrowded by far with absolutely no control.

This happens to me before, but I was properly contact by a hotel, so I can fix the issue with the bank. This was my baby moon, and the ruin the experience for us. Bad management!!!

We arrived only to find out that the balcony was inaccessible due to maintenance. There was no advanced warning and recuperation.
Tried with the local staff, but since it was with agoda, no go. Tried with agoda, but it was outside the cancellation window. Sent a request for reconsideration.

sample_comments.title: The room is too disappointing.
sample_comments.text:
The walls of the room are thin, and I can always hear the voices of the people in the neighboring room and the sound of the shower. There were no amenities like slippers or toothbrushes provided. It felt lacking given the hotel's grade. 

At 6 AM, the alarm in the neighboring room rang for 15 minutes, which was quite unpleasant. If the soundproofing of the walls had been better, it might not have bothered me as much...

The staff's response was excellent. There seemed to be many staff members who could speak Japanese. 

However, I don't think I will stay here again.

sample_comments.title: The hotel has name value.

The interior of the hotel has a historic feel, with a lovely design mainly in white. If you request any hotel service, it takes quite a while for the staff to arrive, so be cautious. sample_comments.title: Moana was good, but watch out for Lanai!

There are no slippers or toothbrushes in the room, but if you contact them, they will bring you the fluffy slippers from the Westin. It was disappointing that the coffee maker provided was old and only had instant powder. I had a partial ocean view room, but I couldn't go out onto the lanai, possibly due to repairs, and worst of all, I couldn't even open the window.

The hotel really showed its age and not very worth the dollar they charge. I am particular very disappointed with no patio access -> that is a killer for the business. Oh, I forget to mention the bell desk, they are very helpful but the front desk people are rude with long face.

sample_comments.title: The location was excellent.
sample_comments.text: I chose this hotel for my first stay in Waikiki. It is conveniently located on the main street of Waikiki, making it easy to stroll the beach and go shopping. The room had a bit of an old feel, suggesting some history, but it was very clean and well-maintained. However, I was extremely disappointed that I couldn't use the balcony at all due to a recent accident. I would have appreciated it if they had at least allowed the windows to be opened. Additionally, when I stayed in a corner room along the street, the live music from the street continued until late at night, making it difficult to sleep. After changing to a room farther away from the street, I was finally able to sleep on the third night, but this could be an important point to consider. By the way, the corner room on the 13th floor along the street was the one where I couldn't sleep. For your reference.

Also, we were scheduled to be in the historic part of the hotel, but on check in the clerk encouraged us to take a room in the tower, which we did bc we thought he knew what he was talking about. Turns out that's where all the construction is going on (bc they had one of the balconies collapse and fall down!!) So we were put in a room in Hawaii where you cannot open the balcony or get fresh air! Imagine that...in Hawaii and you can't feel the ocean breeze from your room bc your sliding dood is soldered shut for the construction! I would avoid this hotel until the construction is finished.

sample_comments.title: Traveling with a baby
sample_comments.text: Moana was my first experience. My family stays here every time we come. The old-fashioned building gives a sense of history. Our room was in the tower. I think it's the newest building, but there are still some things that concern me. Also, the pool is a bit small, but since we have a baby, I thought it might be just enough. The ocean is right in front of us. If you want to use the umbrellas around the pool, you need to wake up early. When we went at a little past 7, they were already taken. We had no choice but to borrow umbrellas from the beach, but there were only two available. It seems you could reserve them the day before. If I had known, I would have borrowed them the day before. It's nice to relax and stay, and since the main street is just outside the hotel, it's convenient for shopping as well. The staff are kind, and some can speak Japanese. I thought Moana would be good again next time.

sample_comments.title: Use for honeymoon.
sample_comments.text:
I was able to stay at my dream Surfrider. I arrived from the airport in the morning via Charlie's Taxi. Check-in was at 3:00 PM, so I entrusted my luggage to the bellboy, who took it to my room. I had reserved a room with one king bed, but when I checked in, I was told that the room was overbooked for some reason. I was quickly moved to a room with two double beds instead. As an apology, I was exempted from the Resort Fee ($50/day) that guests are supposed to pay. While there were some disappointing aspects, I appreciated the sincere response. 

Additionally, I participated in yoga and meditation sessions available to guests, which were held on a pleasant terrace (courtyard) and made for a nice start to the day. However, it seems that these activities and rental services have limited participation numbers or availabilities, so it's best to make reservations early to take part. 

The staff at the desk on the first floor, who assist with tours and activities, were very cheerful and explained everything in detail, which I found very helpful. I definitely want to use this place again.
sample_comments.room_type: Surfrider Oceanfront, Guest room, 1 King, Oceanfront, Renovated

sample_comments.title: If I come to Hawaii again, I will stay here.
sample_comments.text:
The moment I entered the room, it felt like a different world. If you're going to stay, I highly recommend staying with an ocean view. The scenery is beautifully heavenly, and both the sofa and bed are plush and comfortable; I wanted to spend all my time in this space. There are many delicious restaurants nearby, and a target is close, making it convenient for buying souvenirs. I also used the restaurant (The Beach House), and everything there was wonderfully delicious, so I recommend it. If you're staying at this hotel, it's best to have no plans and just relax at the hotel, participate in activities, or spend leisurely time at the beach or pool. Of course, meals are taken out to enjoy on the lanai while looking at the ocean.

There were no issues with the service at all. The Japanese staff communicated in Japanese, so Japanese visitors would feel completely at ease. We traveled with a 0-year-old baby, but thanks to this hotel, we were able to fully enjoy the Hawaiian experience.

sample_comments.title: The ocean view is amazing!
sample_comments.text: A trip with my daughter. I felt over the moon when I was given a lei at check-in! The ocean view from our room on the 11th floor was so amazing that I still smile when I think about it. You can also see Diamond Head beautifully. The time spent sitting on the lanai, relaxing and gazing at the scenery was pure bliss. The access to the International Marketplace and Royal Hawaiian Center was excellent. The Honolulu Coffee shop located on the first floor of the hotel was also incredibly delicious. You can enjoy a first-class experience in Hawaii. One downside was that the shower pressure was low. Other than that, I was very satisfied overall I'm sure I'll be back next time.

sample_comments.title: A prestigious hotel representative of Hawaii
sample_comments.text: The Moana Surfrider, often referred to as the First Lady of Waikiki Beach, stands out prominently. For many women, it is the dream hotel they wish to stay at someday. As it is a cultural heritage site of the United States, the scenery remains unchanged no matter when you visit. I came here on a family trip, hoping to return to this memorable place when I visit Hawaii again... It faces Kalakaua Avenue, so the access for dining and shopping is excellent! The hotel staff is friendly, overflowing with hospitality and kindness. The rooms were well cleaned and had a sense of cleanliness! I had a very satisfying stay! Thank you very much

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Warm Hotel, but cold treatment of guests
sample_comments.positives: I loved the location and the friendliness of the staff. The amenities were nice and the beach access was top notch h.
sample_comments.negatives:
I was contacted by a Hilton rep. via for the Moana Surfrider. They asked if I was celebrating anything, I mentioned that my wife and I were on our honeymoon. They asked for our arrival and departure times, I provided them and requested a late check out. The email said that our requests were acknowledged. I come to find that this was all BS, the front desk staff was surprised that the rep. even asked for our scheduled times as the system automatically checks us in/out.

There was no flexibility, no apology for locking us out of our rooms at 6am, auto-checking us out at 3am because of a billing issue. It felt like we were
Shoved out of the hotel on our last day. Very disappointing.

Furthermore our room was not what we expected. A king bed with an ocean view is what I purchased. I got a view off the hotel next door and if I peaked to the right I got a partial ocean view. Also the room was dirty and not well maintained. The TV, tables, and coffee maker had a thick layer of dust on them. The TV was so damaged and old it was not worth using. The closet door was broken. The charging outlets were damaged so the plugs fell out. Not the quality I expected for spending $4,000+.

sample_comments.title: スト中とか関係なくスタッフの対応が最悪
sample_comments.text:
スタッフがとにかく適当で態度が悪くて最悪でした。
日本、海外含めこんなに対応の悪いホテルに泊まったのはじめてです。

スト中だからとか関係ないと思います。

・預けた荷物届けてくれない
・友達がわざわざホテルのフロントに丁寧に説明してあずけてくれた手紙を紛失しかける
時間差で見つけたあとも悪びれた様子なく誤りもしない
・セキュリティボックスが壊れてるので修理してもらおうとスタッフを呼んだが直らない。しかもその人はホテルの人じゃないからどうもできないと言われる。
・さすがにひどすぎるので部屋移動とアップグレードを頼んだら、はじめ断られる。
・結果粘って移動できたが、移動した部屋もセキュリティボックスが壊れてる
・すぐに直してほしいと電話したのに翌日にくる
・はじめの部屋にヴィヴィアンのサンダルを忘れたので届けてほしいといったのに無いと言われる（取られたか捨てられたかでしょうね）

とにかく思い出しても胸糞悪くなるくらい最悪でした。ホテル以外の思い出は最高でしたが、モアナサーフライダーはまじで最悪です。周りの友達には絶対に行くなと伝えます。

sample_comments.title: Acceptable

sample_comments.negatives: There was ALOT of street noise making it impossible to sleep. Not enough chairs by the pool..

お風呂のアメニティが全く無い。便所は詰まる。お湯は錆色の水出る。 ガウンは最初の日だけ後は補充なし。
日本語対応も毎回適当で悲しくなる。
日本人が多いホテルなのだからもっと日本人に良い対応と優しさが欲しいですね。

それなりの金額取るなら企業努力してください。

sample_comments.positives: The lobby area is beautiful, location is right in the middle of everything, very busy. If you like being a part of it all this is the place to stay.
sample_comments.negatives: I felt duped. Always wanted to stay in this beautiful, luxurious hotel. The lobby is just that, but only the lobby area. The room was so disappointing, very old/dated, in desperate need of renovation, dark and gloomy. We stayed in a tower room. Ocean view was a peek only and a close up view of 100 rooms of the next hotel over. I wondered why no one was in the pool...it was frigid. Pool opened at 7am. I was there at 6:40 and got the last 2 lounge chairs. Other "saved" chairs weren't occupied until 10:30.

sample_comments.title: ロケーション代
sample_comments.text:
人生で一度は泊まりたいと思っていた場所に今回初めて宿泊しました。
バルコニー付きの少し広めのお部屋でしたので、ロケーションは抜群、The HAWAII を感じることができました。しかしながら淡々としたチェックイン時の対応、アメニティの不足(言えばもらえたかもですが)宿泊代も安くはなかったので、少し期待し過ぎていたせいか残念な気持ちでした。

sample_comments.title: Below average value for premium pricing - worst value for money ratio I ever encountered
sample_comments.positives:
- Premium location, directly at the beach.
-Staff is friendly I guess? (Honestly, I never really was at any hotel where this was not the case, but still it is technically positive)
- Building looks very fancy
sample_comments.negatives:
- Very thin walls, you hear EVERYTHING your neighbors do.
- Internet is extremely slow (e.g. 25 kb/s - unusable for almost everything). Upon complaining I was given a WiFi hotspot device, but it was not really faster.
- AC and fridge very noisy
- rooms are tiny, barely enough space to place the suitcase.

sample_comments.title: 最高の立地
sample_comments.text:
どこにでもアクセスの良いワイキキのど真ん中！！最高の立地でした。
従業員ストにより、滞在中は清掃サービスやレストラン営業が行われていませんでしたが、、、リゾートフィーを支払わなくてもよかったし、そこまでの不便は感じませんでした。宿泊客の大多数が日本人なので日本語でのサービスもバッチリ！友人と泊まるなら、新しいホテルもいいですが年老いた両親を連れて泊まるなら安心のホテルです。、

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Historic and right by the beach.
sample_comments.negatives: The rooms were over priced. We booked with friends, but they couldn't get us near each other. Also, our beach front room was actually a roof view with some beach views. Was very disappointing.

sample_comments.title: 高い割には良くなかった
sample_comments.text: 3人で44万円の割には全てにおいて良く無かった。バスタオルとバスローブは2人分、シャンプー、リンスにいたってはミニボトル各1個次の日も補充無し、過去２度ロイヤルハワイアンに泊まったが、そんな事は無かった。

sample_comments.title: 場所が良いだけのホテル
sample_comments.text:
立地的にWaikiki側に建物がなく、ダイアモンドヘッドがきれいに見える最高の場所です。
しかし清掃はきちんとしていますが部屋の設備は古く、バスタブなし、シャワールームとトイレと洗面所が一体で狭いです。部屋の中で何か食べたくともそんな場所はありません。
またチェックインした時にはシャンプーやソープもなく言わないと持ってきません。スリッパもありません。歯磨き用のコップは使い捨ての物を雑においてあり、エコに配慮と書いておきながら全くそれに反しているようなもうかりゃいいという感じが透けてみえます。
コーヒーはあってもカップがない日もあり、お世辞にも良いホテルとは言えません。

sample_comments.title: タワーの末尾83はエレベータ横なのでうるさい
sample_comments.text:
タワーの末尾83に宿泊
エレベータが開く音が気になり眠れなかった。2日間、我慢したがたえきれずルームチェンジ。
変更した部屋にはアメニティが不足していたが、特に使用しないので要求しなかった。
ハワイのビーチに面しているホテルは老朽化がすすんでいる
以前はリゾートフィーに駐車場料金も含まれていたが、今は駐車場料金は別になってしまった。
そのうえ、値段もあがっていた。使いもしないものがばかりが含まれているリゾートフィーである。

sample_comments.title: 場所はよいけれど、、、
sample_comments.text: シティ側に泊まりました。場所はワイキキビーチ目の前で言わずもがな最高です。しかし値段の割には内装は普通で、ドアの建て付けも悪く騒音もありました。わざわざこの値段を払って泊まる価値ははっきり言ってありません。
sample_comments.room_type: Banyan Room, Guest room, 1 King or 1 Queen, City view, Renovated

sample_comments.title: ロケーションはいいけどサービスは・・・・
sample_comments.text:
連れがどうしてもここに泊まりたいというので、コストパフォーマンスが悪いのは承知で予約しました。飛行機の予約が取れたのが出発の前日で、それからホテルを予約したので各種プロモーションの恩恵に預かれずオーシャンフロントの部屋が近くしました。
ドアや冷蔵庫の建てつけの悪さ、隣の部屋の音漏れ、シャワーのみで信じられない狭さの洗面所、掃除も不完全で毎日サプライされると謳っているミネラルウオーターも催促しなければ持ってきてくれなかったり、レストランで目があっても従業員同士チャットに夢中になりすぐにテーブルに来てくれなかったり、歴史に胡坐をかいてサービスがおろそかになっていると感じます。
ウエスティンはシェラトンより格上のはずですが、お隣のシェラトンの方がサービスも施設もずっと良かったです。
それでもコロニアル風の建物とロケーションの良さは格別なので、覚悟のうえでなら新婚旅行などイベントに利用するにはいいかもしれません。
sample_comments.positives: ロケーション、雰囲気

sample_comments.title: 施設
sample_comments.text:
1日の大半を過ごす、プールは6:30〜オープンだが〜6:00前に宿泊客が椅子の取り合いで大半が午前中プールに来ないのに、本や私物を置いてスペース確保している。実際に朝から入る客は椅子が無くなりプールから遠方の椅子を利用してる
この事で、毎日外人がスタッフにクレームしていた！

プライベートビーチのパラソルレンタルがUSD100(15,000円程)、こちらも事前予約不可で当日7:00翌日のオンライン予約のみ！！4日トライしてようやく予約が何れましたっ

人身事故？理由は分かりませんがバルコニー利用は完全NG
オーシャンビューの意味が無かった！

チェックインの際、アップグレードの部屋を紹介された、半額と言いながらUSD350アップチャージ(日) 55,000円×日を払う訳無いし時間の無駄感万歳でした！
sample_comments.room_type: Tower Waikiki City View, Larger Guest room, 1 King, City view, Renovated, Balcony

sample_comments.title: 子連れ注意！！部屋の前の大通りで連日深夜の大音量の路上ライブ。うるさくて眠れません。
sample_comments.text:
ホテルのサービス、ホスピタリティは想像通りとてもよかったです。
ただ、立地上カラカウア通りで行われるパフォーマンスやライブがとにかく大変な大音量です。音楽、歓声、手拍子、掛け声、本当に部屋の真下がライブハウスの状態で、深夜０時ごろまで続きます。
その時間まで眠らない人にはとてもお勧めのホテルなのですが、幼児連れやお年を召した方など、２１時くらいにはとても眠れませんのでそれを覚悟の上、ご予約されることをお勧めします。
５歳の子がいてここまで騒がしいとは思っていなかったので、２日目の夜中に音をあげてフロントに相談したのですが、違法ではないので警察も何もできない、他の高額な部屋ならましかもしれませんが？とのことでした。
残念ですが、２度と宿泊することはないと思います。

sample_comments.title: ハネムーンで利用

sample_comments.title: オーシャンフロントの歴史あるホテル
sample_comments.text:
Diamond Building Room with Ocean Viewの４階に滞在しました。波の音が心地よく眺めも抜群でした。
ただ、洗面台が狭いのがとても残念でした。
洗面台が狭い代わりに、お部屋のデスクのところに鏡があったらよかったのですが、鏡は入口側の姿見しかなく、お化粧するのにとても不便です。
お部屋の狭さとオーシャンフロントを差し引いても少し割高に感じます。

メイドさんも、１日だけですがお水の補給を忘れていた日がありました。たかがお水ですが、旅行では何があるかわからないので、少し残念でした。
ですが、洗面台の水の流れが悪く、廊下にいたメイドさんに言ったらすぐに対応してくれたので、そこはとても感謝しています。

１階にはホノルルコーヒー、向かいにABCストア、向かいのプリンセスカイウラニのパーキングを無料で使用することができ、利便性はとてもいいです。
レンタカーもALAMOがパーキングの目の前にあるので良かったです。

ワイキキに人が多いので、騒がしさがこのホテルのいいところを少し消してしまっている気もします。
次滞在するときはワンランク上のお部屋に滞在したいと思います。
sample_comments.positives: オーシャンフロントと波の音がとても心地よかった。グループ旅行だったので、ワイキキの中心にあり他ホテル滞在の友達と集まりやい位置にある。ウォッシュレットがついている。古いけど清潔感がある。

sample_comments.title: ロケーションも良く部屋も清潔でした。もう少し部屋が広ければ更に良い。
sample_comments.text:
今回は息子と2人旅でしたので、ツインを希望しました。
ロケーション的には窓の外はワイキキビーチで、浜の様子がとても良く特に夕陽はとてもきれいでした。
また、ワイキキの真ん中なので、買い物にも便利でとても利便性が良かったです。
食事はまぁまぁという感じでしたが、雰囲気はとても良くリラックスできましたね。
ただ、今回は車で島を回りたかったので、滞在中ずっとレンタカーを借りていましたが、
ホテル内には駐車場が無く近くのホテルの駐車場に止めに行くのが少し面倒でした。
ホテルでは日本人が何組か結婚式を挙げていましたので、子供連れよりもカップルにはいいとおもいました。
何にしても良いホテルでしたので満足しました。
sample_comments.positives: クラシックできれい。

ホテルの前でパフォーマンスしてる人たちの音楽が聞こえるので、ベランダをあけたままはうるさいかも知れません。

sample_comments.title: ワイキキ最古の老舗ホテル！白亜の建物が旅行気分を盛り上げます！も旅行気分に拍車をかけて満足度アップでした。
sample_comments.text: ロケーションと部屋からのワイキキビーチとダイヤモンドヘッドの眺望は最高でした。さすがワイキキ最古の老舗ホテル！白亜の建物も旅行気分に拍車をかけて満足度アップ。お客用エレベーターの故障が多く、従業員用エレベーターの利用をよぎなくされたことが玉に傷でした。

sample_comments.title: 毎日が結婚式
sample_comments.text: 6泊しました。プール＆ビーチは可もなく不可もなく...。ジャグジーがあるロイヤルハワイアンの勝ちかなと思います。やはりワイキキの真ん中にあるところがモアナの最大の強みでしょう。ショッピングや散歩に出かけるのは最高です。ツアーを申し込んでも拾ってもらいやすい。お部屋も清潔で満足でした。唯一、ちょっと難だったのが毎日毎日行われている日本人の結婚式。多いときは同時に3人のブライドを見ました。のんびり滞在、という雰囲気の出るホテルではないようです。

ちょうどrimoaの直営店もホテル内に入っているので、円高を利用して購入しました。日本で買うよりずっとお得でした。ワイキキビーチまでも近いので散歩するのに最適な立地条件。また利用したいです。

sample_comments.title: 満足しました

妻の希望もあり前回のロイヤルハワイアンからこちらに。総合的に満足度の高いホテルでした。
部屋はタワーウイングのオーシャンビュー。目の前にダイヤモンドヘッドとワイキキビーチが見渡せ最高。部屋の広さも充分でバルコニーも広くて快適な滞在でした。　ただ部屋にあるミネラル・ウォーターが有料だったり、ビーチチェア＆パラソルも有料（US$20)となんだかがめつい点も目に付きました。以前のハワイアンは水もチェアも無料だったので、スターウッドになって方針が変わったのでしょうか？　それ以外の満足度は極めて高かったので、次回も泊まってみたいと思いました。

sample_comments.title: 와이키키서 위치가 가장 좋은 호텔
sample_comments.text: 굉장히 라스트 미닛에 예약할수 있는 좋은 호텔이 한정되어있어서 이곳을 선택하게됐는데~~ 세 방다 와이키키 해변을 볼수있는 오션뷰에 발코니가 있는 방을 사용하게되어 좋았다. 타워윙의 방에서 묶었는데 이 곳 윙의 방이 호텔의 객실들 중 가장 커서 아주 편하게 지내다 왔다. 이 호텔의 가장 큰 매력은 와이키키의 정중앙에 위치하여 여기저기 걸어서 다니기가 아주 편했다. 호텔의 비치바도 아주 맘에들었다. 단, 호텔의 수영장은 굉장히 작다. 가족여행하시는 분은 참조해야할듯. 스타우드 계열의 호텔이라서 믿음직스런 부분이 있다. 단, 시티뷰 객실은 시끄러울듯.

sample_comments.title: Awesome location, decent hotel, unhelpful staff
sample_comments.positives:
While the hotel building is not new, it is well maintained, clean and has a lot of charm
The beach is right in front of the hotel, and it is an amazing beach
sample_comments.negatives: Upon arrival we met with a worker strike - which happens - but the staff was very limited and very unhelpful. Specifically, our physical credit card maxxed out and the staff refused to take a digital card (i.e. Apple Pay / Google Wallet), take the card details or take a bank transfer. Be warned that you must have an active physical card with you, even though most places in the states will not have that issue.

secondary.description_full:
Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach - Nơi lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời

Với vị trí tuyệt vời tại Waikiki Beach, Honolulu (HI), Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa là một khách sạn 4.5 sao đẳng cấp. Với 791 phòng nghỉ sang trọng, khách sạn này mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm đáng nhớ.

Khách sạn có thời gian nhận phòng từ 03:00 PM và trả phòng đến 12:00 PM, giúp du khách linh hoạt trong việc sắp xếp lịch trình kỳ nghỉ của mình. Đặc biệt, Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa cho phép trẻ em từ 0 đến 17 tuổi ở miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có con nhỏ.

Các tiện nghi giải trí tại Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach

Khi lưu trú tại Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach, bạn sẽ có cơ hội trải nghiệm nhiều tiện nghi giải trí tuyệt vời. Khách sạn này cung cấp một số cửa hàng đa dạng, nơi bạn có thể mua sắm và tìm kiếm những món quà độc đáo. Ngoài ra, quầy bar tại đây sẽ mang đến cho bạn những ly cocktail ngon miệng và không gian thư giãn để thưởng thức. 

Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và làm mới cơ thể, hãy tận hưởng các dịch vụ massage, phòng xông hơi và phòng tắm nước nóng tại spa của khách sạn. Đây là nơi lý tưởng để bạn thả lỏng và tận hưởng những phút giây thư giãn sau một ngày dài khám phá. Ngoài ra, khu vườn xanh mát và khu vực chung với TV của khách sạn cũng là những điểm đến thú vị để bạn thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian thoải mái. Cuối cùng, bạn cũng có thể ghé qua cửa hàng quà lưu niệm để tìm những món đồ độc đáo để mang về làm kỷ niệm về chuyến du lịch của mình.

Cơ sở vật chất thể thao tại Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach

Với nhiều tiện nghi thể thao đa dạng, Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích hoạt động thể thao và giải trí. Khách sạn này cung cấp một hồ bơi trong nhà, phòng tập thể dục hiện đại và các hoạt động thể thao dưới nước không sử dụng động cơ.

Với bãi biển riêng tư và hồ bơi ngoài trời, khách sạn cung cấp nhiều lựa chọn cho khách muốn tận hưởng nắng và biển. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có một quầy bar bên bể bơi, nơi khách có thể thưởng thức đồ uống mát lạnh trong khi tận hưởng không gian tuyệt đẹp.

Khách sạn cũng cung cấp các hoạt động thể thao khác như câu cá, lặn biển, bóng chuyền, đi bộ đường dài và lướt ván buồm. Với vị trí gần biển, khách sạn cũng cho phép khách tham gia các hoạt động như lặn ngắm san hô và snorkeling. Moana Surfrider, A Westin Resort & Spa, Waikiki Beach - khách sạn 4.5 sao tại Honolulu (HI).
Địa chỉ: 2365 Kalakaua Avenue, Waikiki, Honolulu (HI), Hoa Kỳ.
Nằm ở vị trí chiến lược tại Waikiki, cho phép quý khách lui tới và gần với các điểm thu hút và tham quan địa phương. Hãy nhớ dành một chút thời gian để thăm thú Đài tưởng niệm USS Arizona cũng như Bãi biển Waikiki gần đó. Chỗ nghỉ 4 sao này được trang bị các tiện nghi ngay trong khuôn viên để nâng cao chất lượng và niềm vui cho kỳ nghỉ của quý khách.
Tiện ích: Bàn tiếp tân [24 giờ], Bãi biển riêng, Bãi đỗ xe [tại chỗ], Bãi đỗ xe có nhân viên, Bình chữa cháy, Bơi với ống thở, Bơi xuồng, Bảo vệ [24 giờ], Bể bơi có tầm nhìn, Bể bơi [ngoài trời], Bồn tắm nước nóng, Bữa ăn cho trẻ, CCTV bên ngoài chỗ nghỉ, CCTV trong khu vực chung, Chuyến du lịch, Các môn thể thao dưới nước (không có động cơ), Các phương tiện dành cho khách khuyết tật, Cách bãi biển 20 mét, Có cung cấp hóa đơn, Có thể yêu cầu không khử trùng phòng, Cơ sở vật chất cho họp mặt/tiệc lớn, Cửa hàng tạp hóa, Dép đi trong nhà, Dịch vụ Internet, Dịch vụ thanh toán không sử dụng tiền mặt, Dịch vụ trông trẻ, Dọn phòng hằng ngày, Giường cũi của em bé (theo yêu cầu), Giải trí trong khuôn viên, Giặt khô.
Điểm đánh giá 8.5/10 dựa trên 1609 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Địa điểm, Dịch vụ, Không khí, Nhận phòng, Tiện nghi trong phòng, Độ sạch sẽ, Độ thoải mái của phòng, Hướng nhìn từ phòng.
Các loại phòng: Tower Waikiki City View, Larger Guest room, 2 Queen, City view, Renovated, Balcony; Tower Waikiki City View, Larger Guest room, 1 King, City view, Renovated, Balcony; Tower Ocean View, Larger Guest room, 2 Queen, Ocean view, Renovated, Balcony; Tower DiamondHead Ocn Ste, 1 Bedroom Suite, 1 King, Oceanfront, Renovated, Balcony; Tower Presidential Suite, 1 Bedroom Presidential Suite, 1 King, Oceanfront, Renovated, Balcony; Tower Ocean View, Larger Guest room, 1 King, Ocean view, Renovated, Balcony; Tower Diamond Head Ocean, Larger Guest room, 2 Queen, Diamond Head view, Ocean view, Renovated; Tower Diamond Head Ocean, Larger Guest room, 1 King, Diamond Head view, Ocean view, Renovated.
Gần: Banyan, International Marketplace, trung tâm mua sắm hoàng gia Hawai, Prince Kuhio Statue, Tượng Công tước Kahanamoku, Dukes Lane Market & Eatery.
